raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "metaphorical encouragement of latent inner potential and transformation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "human psychological or spiritual development follows a predetermined unfolding process analogous to biological maturation",
    "a higher or idealized self exists in latent form within the individual",
    "natural metaphors reliably map onto subjective psychological states"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as extended parallelism but mixes observable biological facts with an unverifiable metaphysical claim",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "patient responds positively to poetic or symbolic language and the metaphor facilitates motivation or hope without discouraging agency",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "patient interprets the statement literally as guaranteeing automatic positive change or uses it to justify passivity"
}
